Vehicle.description: Top-level vehicle branch — root of the Vehicle Signal Specification (VSS) tree.

Speed.description: Vehicle speed as reported by the Powertrain ECU via wheel speed sensors. Equivalent to VSS Vehicle.Speed in COVESA v3.x.

Battery.description: High-voltage traction battery branch. In a real EV, all signals here originate from the Battery Management System (BMS) ECU.

SoC.description: State of Charge — remaining capacity as a percentage of full. Reported by the Battery Management System (BMS). Note: standard COVESA VSS 4.x path is Vehicle.Powertrain.TractionBattery.StateOfCharge.Current — simplified here for Milestone 1 clarity.

Cabin.description: Signals related to the passenger cabin environment. Sources: HVAC Controller, interior sensor nodes.

Temperature.description: Current measured cabin air temperature. Reported by the HVAC Controller via an interior NTC thermistor.
